name: Kururun
description: Kururun is a seal-like sea fairy from the Grand Ocean, and is the current Queen's pet. Their cry is "Kururun!" (くるるん～！). They are calm and prefer to act at their own pace. They love to eat their favorite snack: a shell-shaped cookie!

name: Kurusu
description: A young warrior who serves Ayame's family as her personal bodyguard. Among warriors his sword arm is considerable. Is usually sober and honest, and he maintains his honor as a warrior. (Source: ANN)

description: Maam is the daughter of Leyla and Loca, the priestess and warrior who helped Avan in the original fight against Hadlar. After studying under Avan, the latter gave her a magical gun that shoots magic spells, which helped her compensate for her lack of expertise with any of the other schools of magic (which Pop is an expert in.) name: Maryrose
description: She is the shadow counterpart to the "Living Doll" [Rosemary](https://anilist.co/character/200346/Rosemary) and is the oldest person in the children's wing. She has a jovial personality and loves to dance.

name: Naoko Katsuda
description: __Relatives:__ Juzo Katsuda (father), Noriko Katsuda (mother) Naoko is the daughter of a powerful local politician and Noriko Katsuda and the friend of Yuka Kanzaki who has employed Kintaro Oe as part of his campaign team to run for a third term as mayor.

name: Olvia Nico
description: __Height:__ 186 cm (6'1") __Affiliations:__ Ohara Archaeologists __Bounty:__ ~!79,000,000!~ Olvia is Robin's mother and although the two went for many years without seeing each other, her mother still loved her deeply. She was proud of her daughter and considered her amazing for being able to read Poneglyphs at an extremely young age. Her only regret was she was unable to spend time with her daughter and all Robin ever wanted was to see her again and be with her.

name: Orphen
description: Hair: Brown Eyes: Brown Height: 171 cm Weight: 61 kg Orphen is the main male lead. Fans claim "he comes off as a 'badass' kind of guy", because of his apparent lack of emotions, dedication to finish what he is working on as soon as possible (his eagerness to stop helping people he feels he doesn't have to help), and his 'coldness' towards people he doesn't know. He is partly an anti-hero throughout the entire series. The only time his attitude changes is when the subject of Azalie is brought up.
mediaTitles: Sorcerous Stabber Orphen: Battle of Kimluck

name: Panda
description: Panda is a teenager who enjoys eating bamboo and lazing around. He loves bamboo so much that he orders it everywhere he goes, even if it isn't served there (but usually gets a special order of bamboo anyway). He's obsessed with his image of being cute, and is brutally blunt all the time, and is most likely oblivious to how honest he really is. Panda is extremely lazy and not very bright, and he's clumsy, vain and selfish as well.

name: Paula
description: __Species:__ God/Idaten Paula was born about 16 years ago, after being "summoned" by [Prontea](https://anilist.co/character/226660), a disciple of [Rin](https://anilist.co/character/207766). She enjoys talking to birds more than fighting, and is good at silent movement. The birds told Paula about humans gathering at the north and upon checking it, they found out that the humans were resurrecting a demon. Paula was no match for the demon, but [Hayato](https://anilist.co/character/207747) defeated
mediaTitles: The Idaten Deities Know Only Peace

nativeName: ぺリーヌ・クロステルマン
description: __Height:__ 152 cm (4'9") A wealthy and proper fifteen year old Gallian girl who looks down on some of the less-refined habits of her peers. The emotional scars left by the Neuroi's destruction of her homeland cause her numerous problems. She often refuses to work as a team, and develops something of a dislike for the upstart newcomer Yoshika due to her attachment to Mio. name: Queen
description: __Height:__ 612 cm (20'1") __Debut:__ Chapter 925; Episode 918 __Affiliations:__ Beasts Pirates; MADS (former) __Occupation:__ All-Star __Origin:__ Grand Line __Residence:__ Wano Country (Onigashima) __Bounty:__ ~!1,320,000,000 Beli!~ __Devil Fruit:__ ~!Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Brachiosaurus!~ __Type:__ ~!Ancient Zoan!~ Queen the Plague is an All-Star of the Beasts Pirates and one of Kaido's three right-hand men, the Disasters.

name: Raditz
description: Raditz is the biological brother of Son Goku and the eldest son of Burdock. Raditz went to Earth to help in the planet's invasion, and to persuade his younger brother Goku to join the Saiyans in their conquest. However, disappointed to discover that Goku had lost his memories and adjusted to life on Earth, Raditz kidnapped Gohan and tried to force Goku to become an ally.

name: Rinne Byakuya
description: __Height:__ 160 cm [Keisuke](https://anilist.co/character/75502)'s schoolmate, Rinne, is the second year student at Rokukeikan Academy and an infamously emotionless representative of the Discipline Committee. She is unbending and remorseless, a person who obeys the exacting Letter of the Law and has no sympathy or understanding for the Spirit. Her methodical nature and strictness often causes discomfort to the people around her. She values order and control above all with a tendency to be hard o

name: Robin Sena
description: A calm and quiet 15-year-old craft user. She was assigned as a replacement to STN-J. Her partner is [Amon](https://anilist.co/character/300/), who at first ignored her, doing missions with other members of STN-J. But later when Robin's accuracy improves, Amon takes her on more missions with him. Her craft is pyrokinetic, which incinerates anything she wishes and puts her eye on.

name: Rum
description: Rum is one of the side protagonists in the Shadows House series. She is a Living Doll working as a maid in the house and acts as Shirley's face. Rum is a very shy and lonely girl. Not only does she not kiss her master goodnight, but she also gave herself her own name. She's very insecure and has a habit of talking to her finger to calm herself down.

name: Sayu Yagami
description: Light's younger sister.

name: Seon-Hui Kang
description: __Height__: 158 cm **Family** : [Su-Bin](https://anilist.co/character/287199/SuBin-Kang) (older brother) Sun-Hui is the female lead of Seasons of Blossom autumn arc. [Bo-Mi](https://anilist.co/character/210937/BoMi-Yun)'s best friend and [Jae-Min](https://anilist.co/character/210938/JaeMin-Lee)'s childhood friend.

name: Shizuka Minamoto
description: Shizuka is the smart, kind, and pretty neighborhood girl who is the object of Nobita's affections. She takes baths several times a day. Nobita often disrupts her in the bath due to some misuse of Doraemon's gadgets, resulting in Nobita's head getting dunked. She is also known for taking piano lessons unwillingly, which is sometimes used as an excuse for declining to hang out with Nobita.
